methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Georgian Court Orders Deportation of Journalist Afgan Sadigov to Azerbaijan
bullets: Georgian court approved the deportation of journalist Afgan Sadigov to Azerbaijan following a late-night arrest.
The ruling intensifies cross-border legal and diplomatic pressure between Georgia and Azerbaijan regarding media freedoms.
No other significant border security incidents or militant activities were reported in the regional window.
